creator: dustinwenz@ebureau.com
text:
This is almost a stock kernel, with vimage enabled and the ARC patch applied from https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=187594

I see that the checkin yesterday for vfs_subr.c reverted it to back to a version from December due to an unexplained ZFS bug. It's possible this is related, but I've not been able to reproduce it yet on r295115.
